title: cristaria insularis var. johowii
intro: Cristaria insularis var. johowii, also known as the Johow's Cristaria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in various Asian cultures, particularly in China, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain. In herbal preparations, Johow's Cristaria is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
